column1: # Held-out corpus (2026-07-08). 30 portfolio PRs NOT in corpus-e01 — the floor's precision gate.
# Two rubric-blind labelers (A,B), same neutral "how much review?" prompt as Experiment 01.
# consensus = agreed tier; where A!=B both are shown and the higher is the safe default.
# Labels produced blind (labelers read only the vendored diffs + titles), before any floor comparison.
# Agreement 25/30, every disagreement ±1 (E01: 20/24) — same oracle noise floor.
